name: QD Frames
description: QD Frames is a European supplier of premium PVC and aluminium windows, doors, glass facades, roller shutters, and garage doors. We are certified partners of REHAU, Schüco, and FEAL. We deliver to 28+ European countries at 30-40% lower prices than local suppliers. Contact: info@qdframes.com or +31 6 40837919. Website: https://qdframes.nl
